title: 2026-01-09 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 13.89
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2026-01-09: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 13.89/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2026-01-09, the score printed 13.89/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
